$comment: Code<->Figma contract for the BRAND ramp (PEA-219 reorg). Brand is a mode-independent PRIMITIVE alias layer: code primitives.color.brand.N aliases primitives.color.blue.N, exactly as Figma's color/brand/N aliases color/blue/N inside the merged `primitives` collection (pre-merge home: the `brand colors` collection as brand-shades/N). No @theme utility is emitted — brand is a gated reference layer until a component actually needs it. check_primitive_drift.mjs asserts: code brand set == this snapshot (bijection), each code entry is literally an alias of blue.N, and the resolved hex matches. CI can't reach Figma live, so this snapshot is the committed bridge — refresh via use_figma per CONVENTIONS.md §8.
